name: io.github.cachly-dev/cachly-mcp
description: Your AI forgets everything between sessions. cachly fixes that permanently. A causal brain that learns WHY things break — built from every bug fix, git commit, and CI run, without any explicit calls. Arrives pre-briefed each session. Predicts failures before they happen. Never re-researches the same problem. 63 MCP tools · Free tier · EU servers.
